name: Potion of Undetectability
description:
Activate A (manipulate)

Drinking this dull-black liquid makes you undetectable to detection effects.

This grants the same effects as but without the bonus against mental effects. You also gain the effects of a 4th-rank spell, which protects against spells of 8th rank and lower and has a DC of 36 against .

The potion's effects last for 10 minutes.
